# resend_event (Resource)

Manages a Resend event. Cannot use the resend: name prefix.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "resend_event" "example" {
  name   = "user.signup"
  schema = jsonencode({
    email = "string"
    plan  = "string"
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Event name. Cannot start with resend:.

### Optional

- `schema` (String) JSON object defining event payload key/type pairs.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Event UUID.
